title: Allow guests/viewers/etc to access/edit the vote column - 2024 update
excerpt:
Hey Monday.com 
Any update on this feature suggested back in 2021?

posts.author: Christine75 (Christine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Monday.com

Any update on this feature suggested back in 2021?

Allow guests/viewers/etc to access/edit the vote column Feature requests
Im trying to set up a monday board for our companies product feature requests and ideally I want people to be able to view the board and vote on the items using the vote column. I want users to be able to vote on items but I dont want them to be able to do anything else. I already have them set as viewers and all of the columns locked other than the vote column. I also dont want to have to invite everyone in my company. I want anyone to be able to pull up the board, create a viewer account, and…

posts.author: TinaAsh (Tina Ash)
posts.cookedHtml: This is also something we are very interested in. And if Monday.com cannot support this we will have to find a resource that does.
